description_long: This is a vintage-style briefcase with a rectangular, slightly curved body and a rigid structure. The exterior is covered in a textured, brown leather material with a glossy finish, showing some natural wear and patina. The top edge features a sturdy, arched handle made of matching leather, attached with metal hardware. The closure mechanism appears to be a metal clasp or latch system running along the top edge, with metallic accents visible at the corners. The sides of the briefcase are flat and taper slightly towards the base, giving it a classic, professional silhouette. There are no visible external pockets, logos, or corner reinforcements, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian design.
description: A vintage brown leather briefcase with a glossy finish, arched handle, and metal clasp closure. The design is minimalist, with no external pockets or visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular face, glossy brown leather surface, and the arched handle centered on top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the briefcase's depth, flat side panel, and the attachment of the handle and clasp hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same leather texture and handle placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the flat side and the top hardware details.
attribute_handle_type: Single arched handle, made of leather, attached with metal hardware at both ends, fixed and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Metal clasp or latch closure running along the top edge, likely a push or snap mechanism.
